title: Cobblemon Party Extras
description: Enhances the Cobblemon party/summary screen with additional tooltips and information displays, as well as learnable moves
body: ### [Please consider supporting me on ko-fi if you like the mod and can afford it, I appreciate even 1 dollar. ](https://ko-fi.com/raguto) --- _**I grant permission to anyone seeking to add my mod to a modpack**_ --- ## Cobblemon Party Extras Enhances the Cobblemon party/summary screen with tooltips and a team analyzer, also shows a pokemons learnable moves. ### Features Summary Screen Enhancements: - Ability tooltips with hidden ability and possible abilities - Nature tooltips showing stat changes - Pokemon tooltips showing classification (Legendary, Mythical, Paradox, etc.) and form info - Type tooltips showing full matchups (x4, x2, x½, x¼, x0 immunities) - Weakness icons below the type display (x4 and x2 categorized) - Type-colored text for Pokemon types Move Screen Enhancements: - Move tooltips with power, accuracy, description - Categorized move swap screen displaying possible moves (Level-Up, Egg, TM) - Future moves shown greyed out with level requirements Team Analyzer: - Full team analysis accessible via "Analyze" button - Offensive coverage analysis - Shared weaknesses with hover tooltips showing which Pokemon are weak - Team resistances and immunities - Suggestions for team improvement Fully compatible with fakemon as well!
